originalTitle: Marvell’s stock falls despite ‘exceptional’ AI demand driving a stronger growth outlook
summary: The custom-chip maker says revenue growth is expected “to continue accelerating each quarter” for the rest of the fiscal year.
content: The custom-chip maker says revenue growth is expected “to continue accelerating each quarter” for the rest of the fiscal year.
chineseTitle: 尽管“异常”的 AI 需求推动了更强劲的增长前景，Marvell 股价仍下跌
chineseSummary: 这家定制芯片制造商表示，预计本财年剩余时间“每个季度的收入增长将继续加速”。
chineseContent: 这家定制芯片制造商表示，预计本财年剩余时间“每个季度的收入增长将继续加速”。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
